news.title: Sammaan Capital shares surge over 6% after RBI approves IHC's 66.65% stake acquisition.
news.summary: Sammaan Capital shares surge over 6% after RBI approves IHC's 66.65% stake acquisition.

news.title:
RBI approved Avenir Investment's ₹8,849 crore acquisition in Sammaan Capital via preferential issue.
Post-transaction, Avenir to hold 41.2%-63.4% equity; SEBI approvals pending for completion.
news.summary:
RBI approved Avenir Investment's ₹8,849 crore acquisition in Sammaan Capital via preferential issue.
Post-transaction, Avenir to hold 41.2%-63.4% equity; SEBI approvals pending for completion.

news.title:
Sammaan Capital Ltd confirms timely interest payments on secured/unsecured NCDs as per SEBI's regulations.
Details include ISINs, payment dates, and amounts; no delays or non-payments reported for March 2026 payments.
news.summary:
Sammaan Capital Ltd confirms timely interest payments on secured/unsecured NCDs as per SEBI's regulations.
Details include ISINs, payment dates, and amounts; no delays or non-payments reported for March 2026 payments.

news.title:
Sammaan Capital Ltd confirms timely interest payment on NCDs listed on NSE/BSE.
Two NCDs paid INR 0.00647 and INR 6.94826 interest as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Sammaan Capital Ltd confirms timely interest payment on NCDs listed on NSE/BSE.
Two NCDs paid INR 0.00647 and INR 6.94826 interest as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Sammaan Capital allots non-convertible debentures (NCDs) worth Rs 280 crore.
The allotment was done on a private placement basis.
news.summary:
Sammaan Capital allots non-convertible debentures (NCDs) worth Rs 280 crore.
The allotment was done on a private placement basis.

news.title:
Sammaan Capital issues ₹125 Cr & ₹155 Cr NCDs via private placement.
Series I matures Dec 2030 at 8.9%, Series II matures Mar 2036 at 9.2%.
news.summary:
Sammaan Capital issues ₹125 Cr & ₹155 Cr NCDs via private placement.
Series I matures Dec 2030 at 8.9%, Series II matures Mar 2036 at 9.2%.

news.title:
Sammaan Capital issues 7,000 secured NCDs worth ₹70 crore with 9.05% biannual coupon.
These NCDs will mature on January 16, 2036, offering long-term investment opportunity.
news.summary:
Sammaan Capital issues 7,000 secured NCDs worth ₹70 crore with 9.05% biannual coupon.
These NCDs will mature on January 16, 2036, offering long-term investment opportunity.

news.title:
Sammaan Capital Ltd, formerly Indiabulls Housing Finance, confirms timely interest payments on secured NCDs.
Details include ISINs, payment dates, interest amounts, and no payment delays as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Sammaan Capital Ltd, formerly Indiabulls Housing Finance, confirms timely interest payments on secured NCDs.
Details include ISINs, payment dates, interest amounts, and no payment delays as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Sammaan Capital Ltd's Q3 FY26 earnings call highlighted a proposed merger with subsidiary Sammaan Finserve to consolidate lending and distribution for a full suite of mortgage-backed loans. The company awaits regulatory approvals for a preferential allotment to IHC.
Key financials: Net worth rose by INR2,000 crore YoY to INR22,423 crore, AUM at INR44,000 crore, and Q3 PAT at INR314 crore. Gross NPA improved to 1.2%, and net NPA to 0.7%. Asset-light strategy and tech emphasis continue.
news.summary:
Sammaan Capital Ltd's Q3 FY26 earnings call highlighted a proposed merger with subsidiary Sammaan Finserve to consolidate lending and distribution for a full suite of mortgage-backed loans. The company awaits regulatory approvals for a preferential allotment to IHC.
Key financials: Net worth rose by INR2,000 crore YoY to INR22,423 crore, AUM at INR44,000 crore, and Q3 PAT at INR314 crore. Gross NPA improved to 1.2%, and net NPA to 0.7%. Asset-light strategy and tech emphasis continue.

news.title:
Sammaan Capital's Q3 net profit rose to ₹3.1B from ₹3B YoY.
Q3 revenue increased to ₹21.6B compared to ₹20.1B YoY.
news.summary:
Sammaan Capital's Q3 net profit rose to ₹3.1B from ₹3B YoY.
Q3 revenue increased to ₹21.6B compared to ₹20.1B YoY.

news.title:
Sammaan Capital Ltd will host a conference call on Feb 4, 2026, at 5:30 PM IST to discuss Q3 and 9M FY26 results.
The call will feature MD & CEO Gagan Banga and senior management. Audio recordings will be available on the company website later.
news.summary:
Sammaan Capital Ltd will host a conference call on Feb 4, 2026, at 5:30 PM IST to discuss Q3 and 9M FY26 results.
The call will feature MD & CEO Gagan Banga and senior management. Audio recordings will be available on the company website later.

news.title:
Sammaan Capital announces open offer to acquire 34.17 cr shares, 26% voting rights.
Citigroup Global Markets India is managing the offer; addendum published in newspapers.
news.summary:
Sammaan Capital announces open offer to acquire 34.17 cr shares, 26% voting rights.

news.title:
Avenir Investment RSC Ltd and IHC Capital Holding LLC launched an open offer for 26% of Sammaan Capital Ltd's equity.
Citigroup Global Markets India is managing the offer; related updates include public announcements and corrigenda.
news.summary:

news.title:
Sammaan Capital issued 11,500 secured debentures worth ₹115 crore at ₹1,00,000 each.
Debentures carry 9.1% fixed annual interest, mature in 2036, and are secured on company assets.
news.summary:

The plan focuses on strategic consolidation within the company.
